Agency
Case Study · Telegram Bot · Web3

Manada
Panther Bot

A fully gamified Telegram community ecosystem built for Panther Wallet — loyalty tiers, USDT raffles, referral campaigns, and an HTML5 mini-game, all running on Python + SQLite deployed on Railway.

200+Community members
13Loyalty tiers
3Integrated systems
The brief

Build the community.
Own the engagement.

Panther Wallet needed more than a Telegram group — they needed a retention engine. The bot had to reward loyal holders, run surprise raffles, track referrals, and keep growing users coming back daily without manual intervention.

PythonSQLiteRailway Telegram Bot APIWeb3PNT Token HTML5 Mini-gameWebhook mode
What was built

Six systems.
One ecosystem.

🐾
13-tier loyalty system
Members level up automatically based on activity and PNT holdings. Each tier unlocks exclusive perks, roles, and raffle tickets.
🎰
Ruleta Panther
Surprise USDT raffle activated manually via /ruleta_on. No fixed schedule — keeps the community on edge and rewards active members.
🔗
Referral tracking
Operación 1,000 Cazadores — unique invite links per user, tracked in SQLite. Rewards distributed automatically on milestone hits.
🎮
PNT Defender mini-game
HTML5 Space Invaders-style game embedded in the Telegram Mini App. 13 levels, UFO abductors, TR-3B Astra boss. Leaderboard via /game-leaderboard endpoint.
📊
Stats & leaderboard
Live community rankings, personal stats, and game scores — all queryable by members directly in chat.
⚡
Railway + GitHub CI/CD
Webhook mode, persistent SQLite at /data/panther.db, auto-deploy from GitHub. Zero downtime updates.
The community

200 members.
Growing organically.

The Manada Panther Telegram group runs 24/7 with automated moderation, pinned announcements, and the bot responding in real-time to dozens of commands. The screenshot below shows a typical afternoon in the group — holders helping each other, Panther staff answering questions, and the community growing organically.
